name: io.github.scarletkc/vexor
title: Vexor
description: A semantic search engine for files and code.

environmentVariables.name: VEXOR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Embedding provider API key (optional; overrides a stored key; providers can also be configured via `vexor init`)

environmentVariables.name: VEXOR_REMOTE_RERANK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Remote reranker API key (optional; overrides a stored key; only needed when rerank is set to remote)

environmentVariables.name: VEXOR_CONFIG_JSON
environmentVariables.description: Non-secret Vexor config as a JSON object, e.g. {"provider": "gemini", "rerank": "bm25"} (optional; merged over ~/.vexor/config.json; credential fields are rejected, use the dedicated variables)
